fields.customfield_20007: Automated test run TR-456 passed for valid and invalid credentials.

comments.body: Verification evidence was reviewed and accepted.

customfield_20004.name: Requirement Traceability
customfield_20004.description: Reference to the parent or allocated system requirement.

customfield_20007.name: Verification Evidence
customfield_20007.description: Evidence showing that the requirement was verified.

checklist: Done records must include verification evidence.
System requirements must define a verification method.
System requirements must include traceability information.
